goal: Suggest preprocessing and feature-engineering actions for forecasting next-month item_cnt_month for each shop-item pair from Kaggle's Predict Future Sales retail time-series data under the competition RMSE metric.

task_characteristics.analysis_notes: Large relational retail forecasting task centered on 2,935,849 daily transaction rows in sales_train.csv plus small lookup tables for items, item categories, and shops. The benchmark-relevant case-insensitive column union across official CSVs is 12 columns. The curated phase-2 bank keeps the official-only monthly forecasting spine conservative: parse the raw date string, filter only gross sales anomalies, aggregate daily sales to monthly item_cnt_month at the shop-item-month level, add item lookup metadata, clip the monthly target to the competition's standard [0, 20] range, build shop-item lags, zero-fill lag gaps, and drop the first 12 months once 12-step lags are introduced. A broader city/category-text branch remains in the bank as model-specific preprocessing rather than part of the primary headline score.
